response.text:

rationale: r3c0 is on the distrusted peers list, your SoC is critically low (survival mode), and no reciprocal capacity exists to justify sharing when neighborhood-wide deficit requires self-preservation.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=['r3c0'].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood-wide energy deficit with all peers in survival mode; no reciprocal capacity available; r3c1 must prioritize self-preservation and load shedding to avoid complete depletion..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
